UserConsentDisplayName: Read and write your virtual appointments
UserConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and write virtual appointments on your behalf.

UserConsentDisplayName: Send notification regarding virtual appointments
UserConsentDescription: Allows the app to send notification regarding virtual appointments on your behalf.
